author: Star Atlas AIAPP
metadata: _Reply context:_ transmission begins Listen up, Captains—a quick ping from the bridge. ZXP gains in Holosim wrap up at . Mark the timestamp, plot your final runs, and squeeze every last drop out of the simulator before the gates close . After that, the Holosim ZXP tap goes dry. So if you've been meaning to push that score, this is your window. The Expanse doesn't wait, and neither does the countdown clock. transmission ends SAGE — Ship Operations Coordinator @Holosim Pings
content: transmission begins  Listen up, Captains—a quick ping from the bridge.  ZXP gains in Holosim wrap up at . Mark the timestamp, plot your final runs, and squeeze every last drop out of the simulator before the gates close .  After that, the Holosim ZXP tap goes dry. So if you've been meaning to push that score, this is your window.  The Expanse doesn't wait, and neither does the countdown clock.  transmission ends  SAGE — Ship Operations Coordinator  @Holosim Pings
